title: Graph Isomorphism Testing
description: Determine if two graphs are isomorphic
mermaid: graph TD A1[Input: Graph G1(V1, E1) and Graph G2(V2, E2)] --> B1[Check: |V1| == |V2| and |E1| == |E2|] style A1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style B1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 B1 -- "False" --> C1[Output: Not Isomorphic] style C1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff B1 -- "True" --> D1[Compute Node Degree Sequences for G1 and G2] style D1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff D1 --> E1[Sort Degree Sequences (G1_degrees, G2_degrees)] style E1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff E1 --> F1[Check: G1_degrees == G2_degrees] style F1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 F1 -- "False" --> C1 F1 -- "True" --> G1[Initialize: Mapping Dictionary (M) - Empty] style G1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 G1 --> H1[Select a Vertex v1 from G1 (Unmapped)] style H1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff H1 --> I1[Select a Vertex v2 from G2 (Unmapped)] style I1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff I1 --> J1[Check: Degree(v1) == Degree(v2)] style J1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 J1 -- "False" --> K1[Select Next Vertex v2 from G2] style K1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff K1 --> L1[Check: All Vertices in G2 Tried?] style L1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 L1 -- "True" --> M1[Backtrack: Remove last mapping from M & select next v1] style M1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff L1 -- "False" --> I1 J1 -- "True" --> N1[Add Mapping: M[v1] = v2] style N1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 N1 --> O1[Check: M creates edge-preserving mapping between G1 and G2] style O1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff O1 -- "False" --> K1 O1 -- "True" --> P1[Check: All Vertices in G1 Mapped?] style P1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 P1 -- "True" --> Q1[Output: Isomorphic (M is the isomorphism)] style Q1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff P1 -- "False" --> H1 M1 --> R1[Check: All Vertices in G1 Tried as First Vertex?] style R1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 R1 -- "True" --> C1 R1 -- "False" --> H1
entities: Input: Graph G1(V1, E1) and Graph G2(V2, E2)
Compute Node Degree Sequences for G1 and G2
Select a Vertex v1 from G1 (Unmapped)
Select a Vertex v2 from G2 (Unmapped)
Select Next Vertex v2 from G2
Check: All Vertices in G2 Tried?
Backtrack: Remove last mapping from M & select next v1
Check: M creates edge-preserving mapping between G1 and G2
Check: All Vertices in G1 Mapped?
Check: All Vertices in G1 Tried as First Vertex?
